best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-access-008 title: verify the edge case where no user creation is required module: access source pages: 1 preconditions: system is up and running. test data: test steps: 1. start the process. 2. proceed to the decision point "utente creato?". 3. confirm the user has already been created. 4. proceed directly to the home page. expected result: the user should be directed to the home page without needing to create a new user.

test case id: tc-access-001 title: verify the user creation process module: access source pages: 1 preconditions: system is up and running. test data: valid user details (username, password, email). test steps: 1. start the process. 2. proceed to the decision point "utente creato?". 3. provide valid user details. 4. proceed to the decision point "creazione corretta?". 5. confirm the user creation was successful. 6. proceed to the home page. expected result: the user should be successfully created and redirected to the home page.

test case id: tc-access-003 title: verify the commission and offer creation process module: access source pages: 2 preconditions: user is logged in and has access to the home page. test data: valid commission and offer details. test steps: 1. navigate to the home page. 2. start the commission creation process. 3. provide valid commission details. 4. proceed to the decision point "creazione corretta?". 5. confirm the commission creation was successful. 6. proceed to the offer creation process. 7. provide valid offer details. 8. confirm the offer creation was successful. 9. proceed to the home page. expected result: the commission and offer should be successfully created and the user should be redirected to the home page.

best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-access-012 title: verify the edge case where no user creation is required and no profile or guide access is available module: access source pages: 1,3 preconditions: system is up and running. test data: test steps: 1. start the process. 2. proceed to the decision point "utente creato?". 3. confirm the user has already been created. 4. proceed to the home page. 5. access the menu. 6. confirm no profile or guide access is available. 7. stay on the home page. expected result: the user should be directed to the home page and informed that no profile or guide access is available.
